utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Therefore, all 7/7 items are included with all necessary details.
